name: hydration-reminder-ai-mcp
description: Hydration Reminder Ai MCP server. Tools: log water intake, get daily hydration, calculate target. Built by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: log_water_intake
tools.description: Log water/beverage intake. Specify ml directly or use container type (glass, bottle, cup, etc.).

tools.name: get_daily_hydration
tools.description: Get today's hydration summary with progress toward target.

tools.name: calculate_target
tools.description: Calculate personalized daily hydration target based on weight, activity, and climate.

tools.name: get_hydration_tips
tools.description: Get hydration tips and advice for specific situations.
